name: QR Code Generator
description: Generate scannable QR codes for URLs, text, or contact info. Download as PNG.
why: Extremely high search volume. Pure front-end via qrcode.js. One of the most used online tools globally.

name: CSS Flexbox Playground
description: Visually configure flexbox properties with live preview and copy-ready CSS output.
why: Developers google flexbox properties daily. Interactive playground captures that audience with high engagement.

name: JSON Formatter & Beautifier
description: Beautify or minify JSON, highlight syntax errors, and explore nested structure with tree view.
why: Top 3 most searched developer tools. Every API developer needs this constantly.

name: Reading Time Calculator
description: Paste article text to estimate reading time at multiple WPM speeds. Perfect for bloggers.
why: Content creators and bloggers need this. High shareability. Real-time calculation on paste.

name: PX to REM Converter
description: Convert pixel values to rem/em units with configurable base font size.
why: Every web developer converts px to rem. Tiny tool, massive daily use.

name: Habit Tracker
description: Track daily habits with streaks and progress visualization using localStorage — no account needed.
why: Habit tracking is viral. localStorage persistence makes it feel like an app. Very high return visitor rate.

name: Decision Wheel Spinner
description: Add custom options and spin the wheel to randomly pick one. Perfect for decisions or team picks.
why: Highly shareable and fun. Canvas-based spinning animation. Huge engagement and viral potential.

name: Time Zone Converter
description: Convert time between world cities instantly. See multiple time zones side by side.
why: Remote teams constantly need this. Solves a real daily pain point with zero friction.

name: HTML Entity Encoder / Decoder
description: Convert HTML special characters like <, >, & to safe entities and back.
why: Web developers need this when writing HTML strings inside JS. Fast copy-paste utility.

name: Mock Data Generator
description: Generate fake names, emails, phone numbers, addresses, and dates for testing and prototyping.
why: Every developer testing forms or APIs needs fake data. Extremely high utility and searchability.

name: CSS Triangle Generator
description: Create pure CSS triangles for tooltips, arrows, and card decorations with live preview.
why: CSS triangles are tricky to memorize. This saves devs time with an interactive generator.

name: Placeholder Image Generator
description: Generate SVG/Canvas placeholder images with custom size, color, and text for UI mockups.
why: UI designers and devs use placeholder images constantly during prototyping. Quick generator with download.

name: Google Font Pairer
description: Preview two Google Fonts side by side with custom sample text. Find your perfect font combo.
why: Font pairing is a common design task. Google Fonts API free. High engagement via typography selection.

name: Cron Expression Generator
description: Build cron schedules visually with dropdowns and see human-readable description instantly.
why: Developers hate writing cron from memory. Visual builder solves a real pain daily for backend devs.

name: User Agent Parser
description: Detect and display current browser name, version, OS, device type from the User-Agent string.
why: QA testers and devs use this to debug browser compatibility. Instant value with no input needed on load.

name: Screen Resolution Checker
description: Display current viewport, screen resolution, DPR, and orientation. Useful for responsive debugging.
why: QA testers need to note resolutions for bug reports. Loads instantly and shows data immediately.

name: HTTP Status Code Lookup
description: Searchable encyclopedia of all HTTP status codes with descriptions, use cases, and examples.
why: Developers look up HTTP codes constantly. Searchable reference beats MDN for quick lookups.

name: SVG Pattern Generator
description: Generate repeating SVG patterns (dots, lines, cross, grid) for CSS backgrounds with color controls.
why: Background patterns are hard to create manually. SVG output works anywhere. High visual appeal.

name: Emoji Search & Copy
description: Search over 3,000 emojis by name, category, or keyword. Click to copy instantly.
why: Emoji search is extremely popular. High daily use for content creators, marketers, developers.

name: ASCII Art Generator
description: Convert text or images into ASCII character art. Choose font styles and density.
why: Fun and viral — people love sharing ASCII art in chats. High engagement with visual output.

name: Voice-to-Text Notepad
description: Click a button and speak — transcribe voice to text using the browser's Web Speech API. Download notes.
why: Dictation tool without any backend or API cost. Real-time transcription is highly impressive and useful.

name: Text-to-Speech Preview
description: Convert any text to speech using browser voices. Choose language, pitch, rate, and voice.
why: Uses free Web Speech API. Useful for accessibility testing and content previewing. No API cost.

name: Daily To-Do Checklist
description: A persistent daily checklist stored in localStorage. Add, check, and reset tasks every day.
why: People return to productivity tools daily. localStorage persistence = return visitor. High retention.

name: Password Entropy Calculator
description: Calculate password strength in mathematical bits of entropy. Shows time to crack and recommendations.
why: Security content ranks well. Unique angle on password strength beyond basic meters.

name: Drawing Pad
description: Freehand drawing whiteboard with color pickers, brush sizes, eraser, and PNG export.
why: Canvas drawing is highly engaging. Saves as PNG. Kids, teachers, and designers all use this.

name: Reading Speed Tester
description: Time yourself reading a standard passage and get your WPM score with comprehension level.
why: Interactive and shows personalized results. High shareability ('I read 350 WPM!'). Easy to spend time on.

name: URL Tracker Remover
description: Paste any URL to strip UTM parameters, fbclid, gclid, and other tracking tokens automatically.
why: Privacy-focused tools are growing. Real daily pain point — nobody wants to share tracking links.

name: Base32 Encoder / Decoder
description: Encode and decode text using Base32 — used in 2FA secrets and legacy systems.
why: Niche but highly searched by devs working with TOTP/2FA authentication systems.

name: Social Media Post Preview
description: See how your text looks as a Twitter/X post, LinkedIn update, or Instagram caption before publishing.
why: Content creators need to preview character limits. Solves a real problem for marketers and influencers.

name: Pixel Art Creator
description: Color a 16×16 or 32×32 pixel grid to create retro pixel art. Export as PNG or CSS grid code.
why: Highly fun and viral. Pixel art is trending. Unique export to CSS feature sets it apart.

name: CSV to JSON Converter
description: Parse CSV text or files into structured JSON. Preview table, download JSON, copy to clipboard.
why: Data engineers and analysts need this constantly. One of the top searched developer tool conversions.

name: Git Command Builder
description: Select Git operations from dropdowns and get the exact CLI command with explanation.
why: Beginners and intermediate devs constantly look up Git commands. Interactive builder is better than docs.

name: Working Days Calculator
description: Calculate business days between two dates, excluding weekends and optionally public holidays.
why: Project managers and HR teams use this constantly. Real-world utility with high search volume.

name: Breathing Exercise Timer
description: Animated visual guide for box breathing, 4-7-8, and other techniques to reduce stress.
why: Wellness tools are growing. The animation is visually impressive. High session time and return visitors.

name: Visual Timeline Creator
description: Add events with dates to build a shareable visual horizontal or vertical timeline. Export as PNG.
why: Students and project managers need timelines. Few free front-end-only timeline tools exist.

name: Simple Budget Planner
description: Add income and expense entries and see remaining balance, spending chart, and category breakdown.
why: Personal finance tools are evergreen. localStorage persistence. High return visitor rate.

name: HTML Boilerplate Generator
description: Configure options (charset, meta tags, CSS reset, JS) and download a ready-to-use HTML5 template.
why: Every new web project starts with a boilerplate. Interactive configurator beats copy-paste from memory.

name: JavaScript KeyCode Finder
description: Press any key to instantly see event.key, event.code, keyCode, and charCode values.
why: Devs look up keycodes constantly when handling keyboard events. Instant interactive tool.

name: Image EXIF Metadata Viewer
description: Upload a JPG to view embedded EXIF data: camera model, GPS coordinates, ISO, shutter speed.
why: Privacy-conscious users and photographers both need this. Pure browser-side EXIF reading.

name: Prime Number Checker
description: Check if any number is prime and find all prime numbers up to N using the Sieve of Eratosthenes.
why: Students and math enthusiasts search for this. Simple but educational with a visualized sieve.

name: Fibonacci Sequence Generator
description: Generate Fibonacci numbers up to N terms with animated display and golden ratio visualization.
why: Educational and visual. Students and curious learners find this tool delightful.

name: YAML to JSON Converter
description: Paste YAML data and instantly convert it to valid JSON with syntax highlighting and error checking.
why: DevOps and backend developers work with YAML configs constantly and need JSON conversion.

name: Webcam Photo Booth
description: Apply real-time CSS/canvas filters to live webcam feed and capture photos. Download as PNG.
why: Fun and highly engaging. Uses browser camera API with zero backend. People love visual interaction.

name: Audio Visualizer
description: Upload an audio file or use your microphone to see a real-time frequency bar chart visualization.
why: Visually stunning. Uses Web Audio API. Musicians and creators find this fascinating.

name: Video Frame Extractor
description: Load a video file, scrub to any moment, and save the current frame as a PNG image.
why: Content creators need screenshots from videos without video editing software. Pure browser API.

name: ROT13 Cipher Encoder
description: Encode and decode text using the classic ROT13 substitution cipher. Also supports Caesar shift.
why: Historical cipher tool. Great for puzzles, games, and learning cryptography basics.

name: Disposable Secure Note
description: Write a note that is automatically wiped when you close the tab. Nothing is saved or sent anywhere.
why: Privacy-focused users love truly ephemeral notes. Unique value proposition for sensitive temporary writing.

name: UUID / CUID Generator
description: Generate UUIDs (v1, v4), CUIDs, and NanoIDs for testing. Copy single or bulk output.
why: Developers need unique IDs for testing databases and APIs. High daily developer traffic.

name: SQL Query Formatter
description: Beautify and format messy SQL queries with syntax highlighting, indentation, and keyword casing.
why: Database developers write SQL constantly. Formatting tools save time and reduce errors.

name: Dice Roller Simulator
description: Roll custom dice sets (D4, D6, D8, D12, D20) with animated 3D roll effect and history log.
why: Tabletop RPG players, board game enthusiasts, and teachers all use this. Highly engaging animation.

name: CSS Button Style Generator
description: Design a button visually with color, border-radius, shadow, and hover effects. Get copy-ready CSS.
why: Web developers spend time on button styling. Live preview + one-click copy is extremely useful.
